statusLine.command:
input=$(cat)
fields=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir, (if .workspace.git_worktree != null then .workspace.git_worktree else .workspace.repo.name // "" end), (.context_window.used_percentage // 0), .model.id, (.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // ""), (.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // "")')
{ IFS= read -r dir; IFS= read -r branch; IFS= read -r ctx_pct; IFS= read -r model_id; IFS= read -r five_pct; IFS= read -r week_pct; } <<EOF
$fields
EOF
[ -z "$branch" ] && branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "none")
filled=$(($(printf '%.0f' "$ctx_pct") / 10)); [ "$filled" -gt 10 ] && filled=10; empty=$((10 - filled)); bar=$(printf '█%.0s' $(seq 1 $filled) 2>/dev/null)$(printf '░%.0s' $(seq 1 $empty) 2>/dev/null || echo "░░░░░░░░░░")
model_name=$(echo "$model_id" | grep -oE 'opus|sonnet|haiku|fable' | head -1 || echo "unknown"); model_ver=$(echo "$model_id" | grep -oE '[0-9]+\.[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?' | head -1 || echo "unknown")
rate_str=""; [ -n "$five_pct" ] && [ "$five_pct" != "null" ] && rate_str="5h:$(printf '%.0f' "$five_pct")%"; [ -n "$week_pct" ] && [ "$week_pct" != "null" ] && rate_str="${rate_str}${rate_str:+,}7d:$(printf '%.0f' "$week_pct")%"; [ -z "$rate_str" ] && rate_str="no-limit"
php_ver=$(php --version 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' | head -1); node_ver=$(node --version 2>/dev/null | sed 's/v//'); python_ver=$(python3 --version 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' | head -1); RST=$(printf '\033[00m'); PHP_C=$(printf '\033[38;5;141m'); NODE_C=$(printf '\033[38;5;42m'); PY_C=$(printf '\033[38;5;220m'); SEP_C=$(printf '\033[90m'); GH_ICON=$(printf '\342\216\210'); p_str=""; [ -n "$php_ver" ] && p_str="${PHP_C}php:${php_ver}${RST}"; n_str=""; [ -n "$node_ver" ] && n_str="${NODE_C}node:${node_ver}${RST}"; y_str=""; [ -n "$python_ver" ] && y_str="${PY_C}python:${python_ver}${RST}"; runtimes=""; [ -n "$p_str" ] && runtimes="$p_str"; [ -n "$n_str" ] && { [ -z "$runtimes" ] && runtimes="$n_str" || runtimes="${runtimes}${SEP_C}|${RST}${n_str}"; }; [ -n "$y_str" ] && { [ -z "$runtimes" ] && runtimes="$y_str" || runtimes="${runtimes}${SEP_C}|${RST}${y_str}"; }; printf '\033[01;32m%s\033[00m on \033[01;35m|\033[00m \033[01;33m%s\033[00m \033[01;36m%s\033[00m         \033[01;33m%s\033[00m \033[90m%s%%\033[00m  \033[01;36m%s\033[00m \033[01;34mv%s\033[00m  \033[90m%s\033[00m  %s\n' "$(basename "$dir")" "$GH_ICON" "$branch" "$bar" "$(printf '%.0f' "$ctx_pct" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)" "$model_name" "$model_ver" "$rate_str" "$runtimes"
